description: Hardware-accelerated screen recording with customizable video and audio settings
messages.no-portals-desc: Start xdg-desktop-portal and a compositor portal (wlr/hyprland/gnome/kde).
messages.not-installed-desc: Please install gpu-screen-recorder to use screen recording features.
messages.monitor-not-found: Could not detect the monitor under cursor.
name: Screen Recorder
settings.audio.codec-desc: Opus is recommended for best performance and smallest audio size
settings.audio.source-desc: Audio source to capture during recording
settings.audio.title: Audio Settings
settings.filename-pattern.description: Filename pattern using date/time codes (e.g., recording_yyyyMMdd_HHmmss)
settings.filename-pattern.label: Filename pattern
settings.general.copy-to-clipboard-descr: Copy the file to clipboard after recording finishes.
settings.general.hide-when-inactive-desc: Hide the bar indicator when not recording
settings.general.output-folder-descripti: Folder where screen recordings will be saved
settings.general.restore-portal-session-: Automatically restore the previous portal session for subsequent recordings (disables the selection prompt)
settings.general.show-cursor-description: Record mouse cursor in the video
settings.general.title: General
settings.replay.enable-desc: Keep a rolling buffer of recent screen activity that can be saved on demand
settings.replay.duration-desc: Length of the replay buffer in seconds
settings.replay.custom-duration-desc: Enter a custom replay buffer duration in seconds
settings.replay.storage-desc: Where to store the replay buffer
settings.title: Screen Recorder Settings
settings.video.codec-desc: h264 is the most common codec
settings.video.color-range-desc: Limited is recommended for better compatibility
settings.video.frame-rate-desc: Target frame rate for screen recordings
settings.video.custom-frame-rate-desc: Enter a custom frame rate value (FPS)
settings.video.quality-desc: Higher quality results in larger file sizes
settings.video.resolution-desc: Limit output resolution. Default uses original screen resolution
settings.video.source-desc: Portal is recommended, if you get artifacts try Screen
settings.video.title: Video Settings
